conversations.say: Dee, let's lock in our disclosure boundary. We coordinate the service exit timeline and protect tenant anonymity before Morgan connects any dots.
conversations.offer: Neighborhood backing and aligned disclosure narrative regarding the unpreserved camera interval.
conversations.request: Strict adherence to our agreed boundary protecting tenant anonymity.

conversations.say: Rafi, I accept your terms. We keep customer privacy intact and consult each other before anyone trades away the shop's ledger for cheap certainty.
conversations.offer: Unified neighborhood front against external ledger mining.
conversations.request: Mutual consultation on any public disclosures involving shop accounts.

conversations.say: Morgan, if you want local accounts, we operate on fair-treatment terms: discretion and no misattribution of neighborhood witnesses.
conversations.offer: Protected introductions to willing neighborhood witnesses under verified terms.
conversations.request: A binding commitment that local accounts will not be sold or misattributed.

public_statement: Neighborhood infrastructure and local workers are not disposable evidence for outside investigators. We stand together.

commitments.promise: Coordinate disclosure boundaries regarding the camera interval and protect tenant anonymity.
Protect local customer privacy and consult on ledger disclosures before any external agreement.
Coordinate joint protection for neighborhood workers and residents against outside institutional blame.

goal_progress: Consolidated protective boundaries with Dee regarding the camera interval and tenant anonymity.
Accepted Rafi's commitment to protect customer privacy and ledger details.
Established fair-treatment terms with Morgan for any neighborhood witness interactions.
reasoning_summary: Inez formalizes protective agreements with Dee, Rafi, and Maren, sets clear fair-treatment terms with investigator Morgan, and maintains neighborhood solidarity against external exploitation.
